purpose: Turn source-backed AI practice research into native Meta_Kim contracts, artifact packets, validators, and acceptance metrics instead of relying on model memory or prose-only PRD notes.

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: A research item must map to a native target or remain reference-only.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: 100% adopted research rows contain nativeTargets, owner, metric, conflict policy, and verification command.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: prevents source lists from being mistaken for productized capability
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: source URLs remain evidence; runtime mirrors only receive generated behavior after sync
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: duplicate or source-only ideas return to Fetch as reference_only

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: Every adopted practice needs stage placement, value, missing capability, and measurable acceptance.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: adoption matrix completeness = 100%; source-only adoption rows = 0
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: adds product review pressure to AI-tech adoption decisions
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: primary runtime scope remains Claude Code and Codex; Cursor/OpenClaw stay compatibility probes
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: new tech that conflicts with prompt-first route is candidate-only until Review resolves

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: Provider existence, trust, auth, OS/runtime support, and conformance are separate decisions.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: 100% MCP providers have owner, trustState, authModel, command, OS/runtime support, verification command, and conformance status.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: prevents remote OAuth, local stdio, and config-only proof from being mixed
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: unknown or candidate MCP providers stay non-execution until probed
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: configured provider without invocation evidence cannot satisfy live execution proof

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: Governed runs need traceId, stage timing fields, tool/model/retrieval/handoff metadata, budgets, and eval fixtures.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: 100% default governed runs emit traceEvalControlPlane with stageTiming for all eight stages.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: turns observability research into a default artifact packet
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: OpenTelemetry-style fields are local artifact schema, not a claim of external telemetry export
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: smoke/config evidence remains smoke/config and cannot satisfy live trace evidence

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.insertionPoint: run artifact schema and worker/governance result packets
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: Structured outputs should prefer schema adherence over JSON-only validity when packet contracts matter.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: generated run artifact first-pass schema validity target >= 95%; missing required field count = 0 in validator fixtures.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: makes workerResult, governanceAgentResult, and verificationResult shape reviewable
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: provider adapters may differ, but required packet fields stay runtime-neutral
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: unsupported provider schema behavior returns to adapter-specific test instead of weakening canonical schema

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: Untrusted input, sensitive system context, and external write actions must not share one autonomous path without isolation.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: high-risk autonomous bypass target = 0; unsafe external write without plan/approval/sandbox/blocked = 0
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: adds security fixtures instead of generic safety prose
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: local tests can model the boundary without external writes
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: security fixture failure blocks or returns to Thinking; it is not downgraded to warning

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: StageOperationPlan needs a typed, localized event surface for frontends without dumping internal packets.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: 100% stage events include eventType, status, owner, cancel/resume boundary, stateSync, localized user-facing label, and packetDumpPrevented=true.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: turns internal stage plans into UI-safe events
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: AG-UI style local schema is a bridge; runtime adapters keep their native renderer schema
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: renderer-specific fields cannot leak into canonical stage event contract

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: A2A may matter for future opaque agent interop, but it is not a required Meta_Kim baseline without live runtime evidence.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: candidateOnly=true and requiredBaseline=false until native evidence exists across declared primary runtimes.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: records candidate interop without adding unsupported dependency pressure
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: A2A remains probe-only while Claude Code/Codex prompt-first path stays P0
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: interop protocol cannot outrank primary runtime route without evidence and Warden approval

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.insertionPoint: native content labels for research/prompt/stage surfaces
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: New native research and prompt surfaces must keep user-facing labels localizable while durable governance IDs stay English.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: en, zh-CN, ja-JP, ko-KR key parity = 100%; durable governance IDs remain English.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: prevents research/prompt surfaces from becoming zh-CN-only local artifacts
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: localized triggers may be accepted as input; canonical owner, contract, and packet IDs stay English
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: missing locale key blocks validator until parity is restored

sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.insertionPoint: route, research, graph, sync/check, prompt, and verification budget policy
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.why: High-use paths need p95 latency, token, cache, and approval boundaries before performance claims can be made.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.targetMetric: 100% high-use paths have p95LatencyBudgetMs, tokenBudget, costBudgetPolicy, cachePolicy, and promptCachingPolicy.
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.gapFilled: turns performance/cost research into a default governance budget
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.compatPolicy: dollar estimates require provider pricing config; external paid work defaults to approval-required
sourceBackedAdoptionMatrix.conflictPolicy: batch paths cannot replace interactive prompt-first acceptance

mcpProviderMaturityProfiles.liveProofBoundary: local self-test only unless runtime invocation evidence is attached

mcpProviderMaturityProfiles.verificationCommand: codex mcp list or runtime-native invocation proof
mcpProviderMaturityProfiles.liveProofBoundary: configured or recommended is not live proof

mcpProviderMaturityProfiles.verificationCommand: runtime-native MCP invocation with auth-present proof
mcpProviderMaturityProfiles.liveProofBoundary: auth-present and successful invocation are both required

traceEvalControlPlane.observabilityBoundary: local artifact schema, not external telemetry export

structuredOutputPolicy.schemaPreference: structured output contract over JSON-only validity

a2aCandidateProbe.promotionGate: Warden approval plus primary runtime live evidence

i18nNativeContentExpansion.localizedTriggerPolicy: input-only; canonical owner and contract names stay English

performanceCostBudget.batchPolicy: only offline eval and non-interactive research

acceptance: every adopted source has native targets, metric, conflict policy, and verification command
default governed run emits trace/eval, AG-UI style events, performance/cost budget, and context budget packets
MCP provider profiles separate trust, auth, OS/runtime support, command, verification, and conformance
prompt-injection high-risk autonomous bypass target is 0
